title: Nordic Fintech Summit — Open Banking & Payments
description_short: Europe's leading fintech event returns to Copenhagen with a focus on open banking, embedded finance and the future of payments. Speakers from Danske Bank, Nordea, Nykredit and leading European neobanks.
keywords_match: fintech, banking, payments, open banking, digital banking

title: Retail Tech Denmark — AI in Customer Experience
description_short: How Danish retailers are rethinking customer experience with AI agents, personalization engines and mobile-first commerce. Real case studies from Matas, Bilka and Magasin.
keywords_match: retail, AI, customer experience, e-commerce, mobile app

title: Copenhagen Mobile Meetup #34
description_short: Monthly meetup for iOS and Android developers. Talks on Kotlin Multiplatform, SwiftUI animations, and scaling mobile teams beyond 20 engineers. Free pizza & beer.
keywords_match: mobile app, iOS, Android, multiplatform, kotlin multiplatform

title: E-commerce Denmark — Conversion & UX
description_short: Free online conference on conversion optimization, product design for checkout flows, and the state of Danish e-commerce in 2025. Includes panel with Trustpilot and Zalando.
keywords_match: e-commerce, UX, product design, customer experience

title: AI Agents in Production — Copenhagen AI Society
description_short: Practical deep-dive into deploying AI agents in production environments. Talks from Saxo Bank and Vivino on their production AI assistant rollouts and lessons learned.
keywords_match: AI, AI agents, AI assistants, banking

title: Design Systems Copenhagen
description_short: A half-day summit for design system leads. Sessions on tokenization, design-to-code pipelines, and governance models at scale.
keywords_match: design system, UI, UX, product design

title: App Store Optimization Workshop
description_short: Interactive online workshop covering ASO fundamentals, keyword research for Nordic markets, and A/B testing store listings for iOS and Android.
keywords_match: app store optimization, ASO, iOS, Android, mobile app

title: Copenhagen Blockchain Collective
description_short: Monthly community event on web3, DeFi protocols, and NFT marketplaces. Focused on developer tooling and smart contract security.

title: Aarhus Dev Night — Backend Performance
description_short: Talks on scaling Postgres, optimizing Go services, and building event-driven architectures. Aimed at senior backend engineers.

title: Insurance Innovation Forum
description_short: Forum for insurance executives and innovation leads. Sessions on AI claims processing, digital-first insurance products, and mobile self-care apps. Participants from Tryg, Topdanmark, Codan.
keywords_match: insurance, BFSI, AI, mobile app, customer experience

title: UX Copenhagen Lunch Talk — Research in B2B
description_short: Short lunch session on user research methodologies for B2B SaaS products. How to recruit, interview and synthesize findings when your users have day jobs.
